metadata.creator: Tenali Hrenak
metadata.description:
This year’s collection of field recordings was recorded at the 2022 Colorado 50th Anniversary Annual Rainbow Gathering - the year of the jubilee! - in the Routt National Forest near the towns of Hadyn and Craig.

The answer to everything is 42. We gathered at Adams Park. The strange synchronicity that emerged was the fact that Adams Creek flowed through the site, and to the west, not too far away, flows Douglas Creek, and the main supply, kitchen, and emergency vehicle parking was located at the end of the gathering on FS road 42, which any fans of author Douglas Adams already know, is pretty cool, unless you ask Marvin, then it’s just whatever.

We gathered at roughly 8600 ft., which is relatively low for a National Forest site in Colorado. Being the 50th anniversary, many gatherers were over 60, and altitude and uphill movement required taking breaks to catch your breath. Still, it was a most beautiful site with stunning views from every imaginable nook and cranny.

Given the environment, it is likely I mistitled or uncredited a track, so please contact me with a correction.

To assist you with your listening adventure(s), I have organized this year’s recordings by camp. This year’s compilation includes 181 songs, stories, poems, snippets, and what have you, which exceeded the recording expectations I didn’t have prior to attending the gathering. Scroll down to listen to and/or download individual tracks or the complete compilation. Thanks to everyone who has contributed to this ever-growing archive. See you in 5 minutes…

A haiku, composed by Tiny Camp

We are a big deal
Larger than life though tiny
Wind through the aspens

more info: soundsfromtherainbow.org

jubilee
colorado

metadata.title: Colorado 2022 - Sounds From The Rainbow
